items.claim: Tracy Cortez is not a great striker compared to Wang Cong.
items.quote: she's not a great striker compared to Wang Cong

items.claim: Wang Cong is susceptible to getting caught in exchanges.
items.quote: Wang Cong has sometimes she gets caught

items.claim: Luke Raleigh possesses high-level striking, head movement, and defense.
items.quote: His striking, his head movement, his defense. Um he's pretty fluid.

items.claim: Luke Raleigh has the ability to absorb punches well.
items.quote: He's tough. He could take a punch.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is in a decline and should retire.
items.quote: He needs to retire. He's probably never going to win again.

items.claim: Gable Stevenson is abnormally quick for his size.
items.quote: he's he's a athletic freak. Like he's abnormally quick for his size.

items.claim: Gable Stevenson has a high-level wrestling background.
items.quote: He does have that crazy wrestling background as well.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is prone to being wobbled and finished.
items.quote: All his losses is pretty much him getting chin. He's very easy to wobble.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's chin is not the most durable.
items.quote: Whittaker's chin's not the best, too.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker showed endurance issues against Dricus du Plessis after being bullied in the clinch.
items.quote: He showed a little bit of endurance issues against RDR after getting like kind of bullied in the clinch a bit.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney only fights hard for the first round.
items.quote: McKinney's going to go and he's going to fight for a round hard, and that's it.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney tends to check out mentally once he becomes tired.
items.quote: McKinney has kind of shown me when he's tired, he's kind of like checked out like a bit.
